zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Dunbar 2nd Earl of Moray於1371年出生在英國蘇格蘭莫雷時，他的父親John Dunbar 1st Earl of Moray31歲，母親Marjorie Stewart Countess of Moray23歲。他於1391年2月與Margaret Ogilvy結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1415年在他的家鄉享年44歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Dunbar 2nd Earl of Moray于1371年出生在英国苏格兰莫雷时，他的父亲John Dunbar 1st Earl of Moray31岁，母亲Marjorie Stewart Countess of Moray23岁。他于1391年2月与Margaret Ogilvy结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1415年在他的家乡享年44岁。

nameMeanings.name: Dunbar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Dunbar, a place on the North Sea coast near Edinburgh, named with Gaelic dùn ‘fort’ + barr ‘top, summit’.

History: A family of this name were granted the lands of Dunbar by Malcolm III (1058–1093), and later acquired the earldoms of Dunbar and March. These earldoms were then withdrawn from the family by James I in 1434.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Dunbar 2nd Earl of Moray was born in 1371, in Moray, Scotland, United Kingdom, his father, John Dunbar 1st Earl of Moray, was 31 and his mother, Marjorie Stewart Countess of Moray, was 23. He married Margaret Ogilvy in February 1391. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died in 1415, in his hometown, at the age of 44.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Dunbar 2nd Earl of Moray est né en 1371, à Moray, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, John Dunbar 1st Earl of Moray, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Marjorie Stewart Countess of Moray, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Ogilvy en février 1391. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé en 1415, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 44 ans.

Er hat im Februar 1391 Margaret Ogilvy geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb 1415 im Alter von 44 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

Lui sposato Margaret Ogilvy nel febbraio 1391. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì nel 1415, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 44 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Dunbar 2nd Earl of Morayが1371年にイギリススコットランドモーアイで生まれた時，父John Dunbar 1st Earl of Morayは31歳，母Marjorie Stewart Countess of Morayは23歳であった。1391年2月にMargaret Ogilvyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1415年に故郷で44歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Dunbar 2nd Earl of Moray(이)가 1371년 영국 스코틀랜드 모라이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Dunbar 1st Earl of Moray(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Marjorie Stewart Countess of Moray(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1391년 2월 Margaret Ogilvy(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1415년 그의 고향에서 44세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Dunbar 2nd Earl of Moray родился в 1371 г. в местности мореи, Шотландия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени John Dunbar 1st Earl of Moray было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Marjorie Stewart Countess of Moray, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Ogilvy февраль 1391 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер в 1415 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 44 лет.
